use_cases: Social authentication via Apple and GitHub
Remember me functionality for returning users
ai_summary: A professional authentication page component featuring a split-panel layout with a decorative left side containing testimonials and floating animated elements, paired with a right-side login form supporting email/password and social authentication methods like Apple and GitHub. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and Tailwind CSS for a modern minimalist aesthetic with gradient accents and responsive design across desktop and mobile platforms.
